ddt:Target.Name: ACC L47 V1.1
ddt:Target.Description:
Base DiagOnCAN ACC - L47 - version 1.1 -------------------------------------------------------------------- Creation date : 6 NOV 2008 Delivery date : 6 NOV 2008 Check date : 6 NOV 2008
Projects : X47 ECU : ACC ECU (Hitachi) VDiag : 04h DIESE 65630 Stéphane Nicolle (59084) stephane.nicolle@renault.com Applicable diagnosis specification: 65630/2008/28 v1.5
Previous DB: ACC - L47 - version 1.0 draft
Modifications: New size and default values added for requests ReadCANInput, ReadCANoutput, ReadSnapshot Allocation of parameters RearFogLightsRequests and FrontFogLightsRequests Addditionnal value for parameter "ACCBrakingPerformanceStatus" = "BrakingOverHeat"
Compliant SW: PartNUmber allocation on going... Delivery compliant: B2D4th version

Data.Name: AdjustmentStatus.HorizontalAdjustmentValue
Data.Comment: Value seen by ACC during adjustment

Data.Name: AdjustmentStatus.VerticalAdjustmentValue
Data.Comment: Value seen by ACC during adjustment (without unit)

Data.Name: AdjustmentStatus.AdjustmentDirection
Data.Comment: Vertical direction seen by ACC during adjustment (without unit)

Item.Text: Miss horizontal setting of gauged target board
Open circuit or short circuit to battery
Open circuit or short circuit to ground
No possible classification about the type of fault
LIDAR part - Not confugured, adj. incorrect
Automatic or Maunual Parking brake applied
Automatic or Maunual Parking brake not applied
Brake pedal confirmed pressed by driver (TBC)
Brake pedal not pressed by driver (TBC)
ASR or MSR or AYC or ABS in active regulation
LSF waiting and ready to be activated
LSF suspended and ready to be activated
No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery
CAN - ACC Driver Take Over Display Ack
LIDAR - Config., Align or adjust incorrect
Automatic or manual Parking brake not applied
Automatic or manual Parking brake applied
ACC brake requests not received or not coherent
ACC brake requests received and coherent
ACC take over display not acknoledged
ACC force requests not received or not consistent
ACC force requests received and consistent
No ACC inactive regulation display request
Brake pedal not pressed by driver
Brake pedal confirmed pressed by driver
LSF Waiting and ready to be activated
LSF Suspended and ready to be activated

Request.Name: Output Control
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Device.Name: CAN - ACC Driver Take Over Display Ack
LIDAR - Config., Align or adjust incorrect
